lines.speaker: Sergeant Raymond
lines.text: Be on your guard, adventurer. This place is dangerous.

lines.speaker: Sergeant Raymond
lines.text: Adventurer, if you're looking to head back in there, I'd suggest you reconsider.

lines.speaker: Sergeant Raymond
lines.text: There is a horror within that has already claimed the lives of some of our soldiers.

lines.speaker: Sergeant Raymond
lines.text: A nightmare that should not exist. A phantom of the beast that Jhallan took the form of. General Khazard called it a muspah.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A phantom? So it's not actually real?

lines.speaker: Sergeant Raymond
lines.text: It is, and it isn't. Truth be told, I don't fully understand it myself. General Khazard called it a remnant of dark energy. Raw magic released from the prison that has taken form.

lines.speaker: Sergeant Raymond
lines.text: All I know is that whatever it is, real or otherwise, it's very dangerous.

lines.speaker: Sergeant Raymond
lines.text: I won't stop you, but if it all goes wrong, don't expect me to come and save you either.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll keep that in mind. Thanks for the information.
